stories.description: Backend â€” Safety Domain API Routes: Create new Express route module server/routes/safety.ts with CRUD endpoints for all 6 safety sub-domains. Create migration 024_safety_domain.sql.

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GET /api/safety/quizzes returns 200 with JSON array for authenticated tenant
POST /api/safety/quizzes creates a quiz and returns 201

GET /api/safety/vendors returns 200 with JSON array
POST /api/safety/vendors creates vendor and returns 201
GET /api/safety/activity returns 200 with JSON array (max 50 entries)
Cross-tenant GET request returns 404

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: GET /api/vault-docs returns 200 with JSON array for authenticated tenant
POST /api/vault-docs with multipart file creates document and returns 201

stories.description: Frontend â€” Migrate safetyService to API: Rewrite services/safetyService.ts to fetch from /api/safety/* endpoints. Remove all 6 localStorage key constants and all localStorage.getItem/setItem calls. Replace safeParse() with async API fetches.

All safetyService functions are async and fetch from API
getEquipment and getComplianceRecords use getAuthHeaders() instead of localStorage.getItem('token')
